subject: refactor(z-index): migrate LocationSearch Tailwind z-20 to inline Z.sticky
body:
LocationSearch was the last zIndex in src/ not referencing the Z scale
constant — it used Tailwind's z-20 utility class. Numerically aligned
with Z.sticky, but the mix meant a single grep couldn't enumerate every
stacking-order decision in the codebase.

Now a single 'zIndex' grep across src/ finds every callsite, all of
which reference Z.*. Updated the zIndex.ts header to reflect the new
100%-coverage state (no Tailwind z-* utilities for stacking order).

Tags: refactor, z-index, convention
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
